<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="3ICwFBEcYnJ7_A3MfNWM"> <mxGraphModel dx="1212" dy="661" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" background="light-dark(#FFFFFF,#121212)" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TD
 A([Start]) --> B[Initialize Loop Variable]
 B --> C{Check Condition}

 C -- True --> D[Execute Loop Body]
 D --> E[Update Variable]
 E --> C

 C -- False --> F([End])

 %% Node colors
 style A fill:#22c55e,stroke:#166534,stroke-width:2px
 style B fill:#bfdbfe,stroke:#1d4ed8,stroke-width:2px
 style C fill:#fde68a,stroke:#92400e,stroke-width:2px
 style D fill:#ddd6fe,stroke:#6d28d9,stroke-width:2px
 style E fill:#fed7aa,stroke:#c2410c,stroke-width:2px
 style F fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#991b1b,stroke-width:2px

 %% Arrow colors
 linkStyle 0,1,2,3,4 stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px
 linkStyle 5 stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px",
 "config": null
}" id="u0GQVOflvCMhtX-xiins-14"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=10;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
